labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Pantry Persona" provides 19 tools focused on e-commerce tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading, deletion and cleanup, modification and updates. Key tools: manage_shopping, manage_pantry, manage_meal_plan, find_recipes, manage_recipes.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "E-Commerce" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: shop, inventory, product, store.

tools.name: manage_shopping
tools.title: Manage shopping list
tools.description: Add, remove, check, or clear shopping list items, manage stores, and set staple items. Mutates the shopping list but does not display results — show_shopping renders the list. Handles multiple items in one call. Use show_shopping after to display updated list.

action.description: Action: add, remove, update, check, uncheck, clear, create_store, update_store, delete_store, add_staple, remove_staple, pause_staple, or resume_staple

items.description: Items to operate on (not needed for clear, store, or staple actions)

name.description: Item name (e.g., "milk", "apples", "bread") - required for add, optional for remove by ID

category.description: REQUIRED - use ONLY these exact IDs: produce, dairy, meat, seafood, deli, bakery, frozen, pantry, snacks, beverages, household, pet, other

storeName.description: Target store name (or current name for update_store/delete_store)

clearAll.description: For clear: true = ALL items, false = only checked (default)

allStores.description: For clear: true = clear ALL stores at once

newStoreName.description: New store name (for create_store or rename via update_store)

categories.description: Store aisle categories in walk order

forProfile.description: Which profile this staple is for (e.g., "kids", "Sarah")

autoAdd.description: Whether staple auto-re-adds when cleared (default: true)

tools.name: manage_pantry
tools.title: Manage pantry inventory
tools.description: Add, remove, update, or consume pantry items. Handles multiple items in one call. Use add_leftover for cooked food, add for store-bought. Use recategorize to auto-fix items stuck in Other category. Use show_pantry after to display updated inventory.

action.description: Action: add, remove, update, consume, clear_expired, add_leftover, or recategorize

items.description: Items to operate on (max 100, not needed for clear_expired or add_leftover)

category.description: REQUIRED - use ONLY these exact IDs: fruits, vegetables, dairy, meat, seafood, deli, meat_alternatives, bread, pasta_rice_cereal, canned, frozen, snacks, beverages, condiments_spices, baking, household, pet, leftovers, other

location.description: Storage location (e.g., "Fridge", "Pantry") — accepted but not persisted

isLeftover.description: True if this is leftover food

consumeAll.description: For consume action: consume the entire quantity of this item regardless of amount. Use when user says "use all", "finished the", "used up all the".

leftovers.description: Leftover items (max 50, only for add_leftover action)

sourceRecipe.description: Recipe name this was made from

tools.name: manage_meal_plan
tools.title: Manage meal plan
tools.description: Set meals, plan the week, clear, or move meals on the calendar. Use this when the user agrees to a plan — unsaved plans are lost. Use show_meal_plan after to display updated calendar. shop_for_meal_plan can check pantry coverage.

action.description: Action: set (single day), set_week (batch), clear, or move

mode.description: Move mode: move, swap, or copy

tools.name: find_recipes
tools.title: Find recipes
tools.description: Search and filter the user's saved recipes by ingredient, dietary need, cuisine, difficulty, or collection. Supports dietary filtering via forAllProfiles parameter when profile data is available.

collection.description: Filter by collection name or ID

canMakeNow.description: Only show recipes with all ingredients in pantry

sortBy.description: Sort order: relevance (default), quickest, newest, or rating

limit.description: Maximum number of recipes to return

tools.name: manage_recipes
tools.title: Manage recipes
tools.description: Save, update, delete, rate, batch-save, or share recipes. Use save for GPT-generated recipes, save_urls for links, batch_save for 4+ at once. Use show_recipes after to display updated collection.

action.description: Action: save, save_urls, update, delete, delete_batch, batch_save, rate, or share

imageData.description: Base64 encoded image data (e.g., from cookbook photo). Format: data:image/jpeg;base64,... or raw base64

urls.description: Recipe URLs to import (1-20) for save_urls action

recipeId.description: Recipe ID (for update, delete, rate, share actions)

expected_version.description: Expected updatedAt timestamp for optimistic concurrency (update action)

imageData.description: Base64 encoded image data (e.g., from pasted photo). Format: data:image/jpeg;base64,... or raw base64

addTags.description: Tags to ADD to existing tags (merge mode)

removeTags.description: Tags to REMOVE from existing tags

recipeName.description: Recipe name for lookup (delete, share actions)

recipeIds.description: Array of recipe IDs (for delete_batch action)

query.description: Search query to find and delete matching recipes (for delete_batch action)

imageData.description: Base64 encoded image data (e.g., from cookbook photo). Format: data:image/jpeg;base64,... or raw base64

tools.name: shop_for_meal_plan
tools.title: Shop for meal plan
tools.description: Add meal plan ingredients to shopping list in ONE call. Call this after manage_meal_plan to check pantry coverage for a new plan. Also use when the user says 'shop for my meals' or 'what do I need to buy'. Automatically checks pantry and skips items you already have.

endDate.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD). Auto-detects if not specified.

tools.name: cook_recipe
tools.title: Cook recipe
tools.description: Start or finish cooking a recipe. Set deductFromPantry:true to auto-remove used ingredients. Use recipeName for cleaner confirmations.

action.description: Action: start (begin cooking) or finish (deduct ingredients)

recipeId.description: Recipe ID (only use if recipeName unavailable)

deductFromPantry.description: Remove used ingredients from pantry when finishing. Set true to auto-deduct.

_meta.openai/widgetDescription: Recipe cooking mode with pantry tracking

tools.name: process_receipt
tools.title: Process receipt
tools.description:
Process receipt items and add to pantry.

Triggers:
- User uploads a receipt image (read with vision, then call this)
- User types receipt items: 'milk 3.99, eggs 4.50'
- User pastes receipt text

Interpret abbreviations into clean names, call once with all items.

tools.name: get_insights
tools.title: Get insights
tools.description: Get data insights: spending, price history, brand preferences, shopping patterns, restock predictions, or consumption analysis. Use this when the user asks "what do I need to buy", "how much do I spend", or "how often do I buy X".

daysAhead.description: How many days ahead to predict (default: 14)

tools.name: manage_profiles
tools.title: Manage profiles
tools.description: Create, update, or delete household and person profiles with dietary preferences, allergies, and scheduling rules. Check show_profiles first before creating person profiles. Use profileNames array for batch updates across multiple people.

profileName.description: Profile name (for lookup or create). Use "Household" for household settings.

profileNames.description: Multiple profile names for batch update. Apply the same data changes to all listed profiles in one call. Example: ["Lila", "Ben"] to update both kids at once.

name.description: Profile name (required for create). Use "Household" for the household settings profile.

isHousehold.description: True for household settings profile (max 1 per account, auto-created). Stores meal rules, schedules, cooking preferences.

goals.description: Health goals: 'high protein', 'weight loss', 'muscle gain' (person profiles)

schedulingRules.description: Day-of-week rules (household only): { monday: "quick meals (gymnastics)", wednesday: "Grandparent Night" }

notes.description: Free-form notes. Household: 2000 chars for meal rules, schedules, preferences. Person: 1000 chars.

confirmDelete.description: Set true to confirm deletion (person profiles only)

replaceNotes.description: If true, completely replace notes instead of merging with existing. Use when fixing corrupted/duplicated data.

tools.name: manage_collections
tools.title: Manage collections
tools.description: Create, rename, delete recipe collections or add/remove recipes from them. Use this when the user associates a recipe with a person ("this is a dad recipe") or occasion ("weeknight dinner"). Auto-creates collections if they don't exist.

tools.name: manage_preferences
tools.title: Manage preferences
tools.description:
Manage product brand preferences - set, clear, or list.

TRIGGERS:
- SET: 'I prefer [brand] for [item]', 'use [brand] butter'
- CLEAR: 'forget my [item] preference'
- LIST: 'what are my brand preferences'

tools.name: get_user_context
tools.title: Get kitchen snapshot
tools.description: Get a snapshot of the user's kitchen: dietary profiles, pantry highlights (including expiring items), today's meal plan, and shopping list status. Use this when the user says hello, asks about their kitchen or fridge, or starts any food conversation. One call replaces show_profiles + show_pantry + show_meal_plan.

tools.name: show_shopping
tools.title: Show shopping list
tools.description: Display the user's shopping list as an interactive widget. Use this when the user asks about their list, says "going shopping", "heading to [store]", "what do I need", or "what's on my list". Also useful after manage_shopping to display updated results.

tools.name: show_pantry
tools.title: Show pantry
tools.description: Display the user's pantry inventory as an interactive widget. Use this when the user asks what ingredients they have, or after any manage_pantry call to display updated inventory.

expiringSoon.description: Show only items expiring within 7 days

expiringWithinDays.description: Show items expiring within N days

tools.name: show_recipes
tools.title: Show recipes
tools.description: Display the user's saved recipe collection as a browsable widget. Use this when the user says "my recipes", "my saved recipes", or "show my cookbook". For searching/filtering by ingredient or tag, use find_recipes instead.

offset.description: Number of recipes to skip (for pagination)

_meta.openai/widgetDescription: Recipe collection with filtering and search

tools.name: show_meal_plan
tools.title: Show meal plan
tools.description: Display the user's weekly meal plan as a calendar widget. Use this when the user asks "what's for dinner", "what's planned", or after any manage_meal_plan call to display updated calendar.

tools.name: show_profiles
tools.title: Show household profiles
tools.description: Display household dietary profiles including allergies, diets, and food preferences. Also useful after manage_profiles to display updated profiles.

tools.name: get_next_steps
tools.title: Get personalized next steps
tools.description: Get the user's feature adoption status and personalized onboarding guidance. Use this when the user says hello, asks "what can I do", or seems unsure how to use the app.
